method: Novel graduate-level science MCQs across physics/chemistry/biology/CS-theory, biased to quantitative/derivable items. Every gold independently re-solved from scratch and computed with sympy (uv run --with sympy) in a temp dir; intended key compared against the independent solve; only items with agreement (gold_confidence=1.0) kept. Distractors are common-mistake values. Items are author-invented, not drawn from GPQA/MMLU.
